strings.ui.debrief.flawless_performance: Excellent performance! No critical areas for improvement were identified for this character during this encounter.
strings.debrief.ac.title: Alert: Insufficient Armor Class
strings.debrief.ac.desc: {name} took heavy physical damage ({physicalDmgTaken} damage over {hitsPhysicalTaken} hits sustained, evasion rate of {attacksDodged}/{attacksDirected}). Consider improving {name}'s Armor Class (AC) via equipment, defensive feats, or protective illusion spells (Blur, Displacement, Mirror Image).
strings.debrief.fort.title: Alert: Fortitude Weakness
strings.debrief.fort.desc: {name} failed the majority of Fortitude saving throws ({savesFortFailed} failures out of {totalFortSaves} attempts). Increase {name}'s Constitution (belts), acquire Great Fortitude, or utilize resistance spells (Resistance, Heroism).
strings.debrief.ref.title: Alert: Reflex Weakness
strings.debrief.ref.desc: {name} failed the majority of Reflex saving throws ({savesRefFailed} failures out of {totalRefSaves} attempts). Improve Reflex saves using Haste, Cat's Grace, or Dexterity equipment.
strings.debrief.will.title: Alert: Mental Weakness (Will)
strings.debrief.will.desc: {name} failed the majority of Will saving throws ({savesWillFailed} failures out of {totalWillSaves} attempts). Strengthen {name}'s Will saves via Wisdom items, Heroism, or Protection from Evil.
strings.debrief.sr.title: Alert: Enemy Spell Resistance
strings.debrief.sr.desc: Multiple spells cast by {name} ({spellsResistedCount}) were blocked by enemy Spell Resistance. Consider acquiring Spell Penetration feats.
strings.debrief.survival.title: Alert: Survival Vigilance
strings.debrief.survival.desc: {name} fell unconscious {timesDowned} times during this encounter. Adjust positioning or cast preventive buffs (Invisibility, Death Ward).
strings.debrief.enemy.ac.title: Threat: High Evasion or AC
strings.debrief.enemy.ac.desc: The major adversary {name} evaded the majority of your physical attacks (evasion rate of {attacksDodged}/{totalAttacksOnEnemy}). Counter this by targeting Touch AC or using area spells.
strings.debrief.enemy.damage.title: Threat: Devastating Firepower
strings.debrief.enemy.damage.desc: The hostile target {name} inflicted a total of {totalDamage} damage on the group, representing an extreme threat. Lock it down immediately via hard crowd control.
strings.debrief.enemy.saves.title: Threat: Exceptional Fortitude and Will
strings.debrief.enemy.saves.desc: The enemy {name} succeeded on the majority of saving throws ({savesSucceeded} saves passed out of {totalEnemySaves} attempts). Prioritize spells that require no saving throws.
strings.debrief.ally.acid_underused.title: Advice: Underused Acid Damage
strings.debrief.ally.acid_underused.desc: Acid damage from {name} represented a minor portion of their damage ({acidDmg} acid damage out of {totalDamage} total). Acid is highly effective against most demons.
strings.debrief.ally.sonic_supremacy.title: Advice: Reliable Sonic Choices
strings.debrief.ally.sonic_supremacy.desc: Excellent sonic choice for {name} ({sonicDmg} sonic damage dealt). Very few demons in the Worldwound possess resistance to Sonic, making this your most reliable magical option.
strings.debrief.ally.shaken_vulnerability.title: Alert: Missed Shaken Synergy
strings.debrief.ally.shaken_vulnerability.desc: {name} applied the Shaken condition {shakenCount} times but your group did not capitalize on it. Obtain the 'Shatter Defenses' feat on physical fighters.
strings.debrief.ally.summon_meat_shield.title: Advice: Summon Positioning
strings.debrief.ally.summon_meat_shield.desc: Summoned creatures from {name} dealt damage ({summonDamage} damage) but did not absorb threat ({damageTaken} damage sustained by {name}). Position them directly in contact with foes.
strings.debrief.ally.precision_crit_miss.title: Alert: Low Critical Damage Multiplier
strings.debrief.ally.precision_crit_miss.desc: {name} confirmed {crits} critical hits but overall damage output remained extremely low ({totalDamage} damage). Improve base physical damage or weapon enchantments.
strings.debrief.ally.holy_smite_efficiency.title: Optimization: Holy Power Maximized
strings.debrief.ally.holy_smite_efficiency.desc: Outstanding optimization on {name} ({holyDmg} holy damage). Holy damage completely bypasses standard demonic elemental immunities and DR. Continue prioritizing Good-aligned weapons.
strings.debrief.ally.blindness_miss_chance.title: Advice: Capitalizing on Blindness
strings.debrief.ally.blindness_miss_chance.desc: {name} applied Blindness to {blindedCount} targets but still sustained heavy physical damage ({damageTaken} damage). Put distance to force the 50% miss chance roll.
strings.debrief.ally.prone_opportunity.title: Advice: Capitalizing on the Prone State
strings.debrief.ally.prone_opportunity.desc: {name} knocked targets prone {proneCount} times, but no ally triggered free Attacks of Opportunity. Position melee fighters directly adjacent to toppled foes.
strings.debrief.ally.fatigued_exhausted_dampener: {name} fought while fatigued or exhausted, severely reducing AC and preventing charge attacks. Rest immediately or cast 'Lesser Restoration'.
strings.debrief.ally.acid_dps_waste.title: Advice: Limits of Pure Acid
strings.debrief.ally.acid_dps_waste.desc: {name} dealt substantial Acid damage ({acidDmg} damage) but secured no kills. Acid is perfect for wearing down high-HP bosses, but lacks execution power. Combine it with heavy physical strikes.
strings.debrief.ally.cold_control_underused.desc: {name} dealt {coldDmg} cold damage without applying slow or stagger effects. Choose spells that combine damage with solid physical constraints.
strings.debrief.ally.electric_stun_missed.title: Alert: Demonic Electricity Immunity
strings.debrief.ally.electric_stun_missed.desc: {name}'s electricity DPS ({electricDmg} damage) hit a wall of demonic immunity (100% resistance). Acquire 'Ascendant Element: Electricity' mythic feat.
strings.debrief.ally.fire_immunity_blocked.title: Alert: Demonic Fire Immunity
strings.debrief.ally.fire_immunity_blocked.desc: {name}'s fire spells ({fireDmg} damage) bounced off the natural fire resistance of demons. Take 'Ascendant Element: Fire' mythic feat immediately.
strings.debrief.ally.sonic_stun_synergy.title: Synergy: Sound and Stun
strings.debrief.ally.sonic_stun_synergy.desc: Excellent sonic synergy for {name} ({sonicDmg} sonic damage and {stunCount} stuns). Sonic spells target Fortitude, completely ignoring high evasion and reflex AC of agile foes.
strings.debrief.ally.holy_unholy_clash.title: Alert: Alignment Damage Conflict
strings.debrief.ally.holy_unholy_clash.desc: {name} scatters mythic efficiency by dealing both Holy and Unholy damage ({holyDmg} holy vs {unholyDmg} unholy). Specialize 100% in one alignment.
strings.debrief.ally.high_danger_cc.title: Tactics: High-Threat Boss Lockdown
strings.debrief.ally.high_danger_cc.desc: Superb control work from {name}, successfully locking down ({highDangerCCs} CC applied) major threats of a higher level. This is the absolute key to triumphing.
strings.debrief.enemy.aoo_executioner.title: Threat: Lethal Opportunity Striker
strings.debrief.enemy.aoo_executioner.desc: The opponent {name} heavily exploited your lapses ({aoos} free attacks of opportunity). Use the 'Dodge' feat or pass defensive casting checks.
strings.debrief.enemy.prone_striker.title: Threat: Leg-Breaker (Knockdown)
strings.debrief.enemy.prone_striker.desc: The adversary {name} knocked your heroes prone {proneCount} times, provoking free Attacks of Opportunity. Pre-buff with 'Freedom of Movement'.
strings.debrief.enemy.sneak_slayer.title: Threat: Shadow Assassin
strings.debrief.enemy.sneak_slayer.desc: The opponent {name} tore through your flanks ({sneakAttackDmg} damage through sneak attacks). Prevent flanking or obtain 'Uncanny Dodge'.
strings.debrief.enemy.blindness_oppressor.title: Threat: Vision Thief
strings.debrief.enemy.blindness_oppressor.desc: The enemy {name} blinded your team ({blindedCount} targets blinded), causing lost Dex bonus to AC and a 50% miss chance. Keep 'Remove Blindness' prepared.
strings.debrief.enemy.stat_drain_will.title: Threat: Level Drain and Essence Siphon
strings.debrief.enemy.stat_drain_will.desc: The major enemy {name} drained {negativeLevels} energy levels, crippling your attack rolls and saving throws. Cast 'Restoration' swiftly.
strings.debrief.enemy.prone_melee_death_trap.tit: Threat: Melee Strike Against Prone Target
strings.debrief.enemy.prone_melee_death_trap.des: This colossus {name} knocked down your frontliners, then shredded them ({physicalDmg} physical damage dealt). Keep your tanks standing using 'Freedom of Movement'.
strings.debrief.enemy.vampiric_siphon.title: Threat: Active Vampiric Healing
strings.debrief.enemy.vampiric_siphon.desc: The major enemy {name} healed {vampiricHealing} HP by siphoning your party's life force. Concentrate your burst or apply bleed/disease effects.
strings.debrief.enemy.sneaky_assassin.title: Threat: Elite Invisible Assassin
strings.debrief.enemy.sneaky_assassin.desc: The invisible opponent {name} shredded your group with {sneakAttackDmg} sneak attack damage. Spells like 'True Seeing' or 'See Invisibility' are required.
strings.debrief.ally.friendly_fire.title: Alert: Friendly Fire Catastrophe
strings.debrief.ally.friendly_fire.desc: {name}'s area spells dealt significant damage to your own party ({friendlyFireDmg} damage inflicted on the group). Consider acquiring the 'Selective Spell' metamagic feat.
strings.debrief.ally.overkill_waste.title: Alert: Inefficient Overkill Waste
strings.debrief.ally.overkill_waste.desc: {name} spent immense amounts of damage on near-dead targets ({overkillDmg} overkill damage with only {kills} kills). Redirect heavy single-target attacks to full-HP enemies.
strings.debrief.ally.low_sneak.title: Alert: Sneak Precision Missed
strings.debrief.ally.low_sneak.desc: An insignificantly low portion of {name}'s physical damage benefited from sneak attacks ({sneakAttackDmg} damage out of {totalDamage} total). Coordinate flanking positions with another ally.
strings.debrief.ally.overhealing.title: Alert: Healing Waste (Overhealing)
strings.debrief.ally.overhealing.desc: {name} generated a high volume of healing ({healingDone} HP healed) while the team sustained minimal damage ({damageTaken} damage taken). Adjust healing timing to save resources.
strings.debrief.ally.vampiric_waste.title: Alert: Inefficient Vampiric Siphoning
strings.debrief.ally.vampiric_waste.desc: {name} absorbed {healingDone} HP through vampiric effects while at full health (0 damage taken). Reserve these valuable skills for front-line combat.
strings.debrief.ally.low_aoo.title: Alert: Lost Opportunities in Combat
strings.debrief.ally.low_aoo.desc: {name} confirmed {crits} critical hits in melee but triggered no Attacks of Opportunity. Consider acquiring the 'Combat Reflexes' feat to exploit enemy vulnerabilities.
strings.debrief.ally.cc_locked.title: Alert: Continuous Mental Lockdown
strings.debrief.ally.cc_locked.desc: {name} spent several combat turns paralyzed, stunned, or asleep (total of {ccLocked} crowd control effects sustained). Pre-buff with 'Freedom of Movement' or 'Unbreakable Heart'.
strings.debrief.ally.deaths_door.title: Alert: Poised at Death's Door
strings.debrief.ally.deaths_door.desc: {name} activated the 'Death's Door' effect. Cast 'Death Ward' pre-combat to completely negate negative energy drains and death spells.
strings.debrief.ally.magical_reliance.title: Alert: Bypassed Spell Penetration
strings.debrief.ally.magical_reliance.desc: {name}'s magical DPS is heavily blocked by enemy Spell Resistance ({spellsResistedCount} spells resisted). Prioritize Conjuration spells that ignore SR, or invest in penetration feats.
strings.debrief.ally.physical_res.title: Alert: Blocked by Damage Reduction (DR)
strings.debrief.ally.physical_res.desc: {name}'s physical attacks bounced off enemy Damage Reduction (highest hit did only {maxSingleHit} damage). Use appropriate materials (Cold Iron, Alchemical Silver) or align weapons.
strings.debrief.enemy.crit_spammer.title: Threat: Lethal Confirmed Crit Storm
strings.debrief.enemy.crit_spammer.desc: The opponent {name} confirmed {crits} critical hits on your group. Utilize your shaman's 'Protective Luck' hex, or force concealment to add an extra miss chance roll.
strings.debrief.enemy.dodge_god.title: Threat: Absolute Physical Evasion
strings.debrief.enemy.dodge_god.desc: The major foe {name} is virtually immune to physical attacks ({attacksDodged} dodges out of {totalAttacksOnEnemy} assaults). Target Touch AC or force Reflex saves.
strings.debrief.enemy.unholy_dev.title: Threat: Unleashed Sacrilegious Corruption
strings.debrief.enemy.unholy_dev.desc: The dangerous foe {name} dealt immense Unholy ({unholyDmg}) or Negative ({negativeDmg}) damage. Pre-combat 'Death Ward' is mandatory to survive.
strings.debrief.enemy.cc_oppressor.title: Threat: Area Control and Dominance
strings.debrief.enemy.cc_oppressor.desc: The opponent {name} paralyzed, stunned, or terrified your frontline ({ccCount} CC effects applied). Target its weak Fortitude or Will saves to break focus.
strings.debrief.enemy.stat_destroyer.title: Threat: Siphoned Attribute and Essence
strings.debrief.enemy.stat_destroyer.desc: The foe {name} is slowly destroying your fighters ({statDamage} attribute damage and {negativeLevels} levels drained). Keep 'Restoration' prepared post-combat.
strings.debrief.enemy.summon_spammer.title: Threat: Planar Summon Overload
strings.debrief.enemy.summon_spammer.desc: The major enemy {name} flooded the field with summoned minions ({summonDamage} damage sustained from summons). Ignore minions and burst down the summoner.
strings.ui.misc.no_feats: No noteworthy feat of arms marked this engagement.
strings.SPEC_GENERAL_OUTRE_PLAN: The General of the Outer Planes
strings.ACH_GEN_CHAMPION_EVIL_DESC: Designated{accord} champion of the conflict, displaying implacable ferocity. {pronoun} held dominion over the battlefield, shattering the foe, utterly bereft of mercy.
strings.ACH_GEN_CHAMPION_GOOD_DESC: Chosen{accord} as the undisputed master of the fray. {pronoun} dictated the strategic tempo of this confrontation with a mastery beyond mortal ken.
strings.ACH_GEN_PIVOT_DESC: Designated{accord} as the very fulcrum of this engagement. Without {pronounObj}, the cohort's stratagems would have faltered, bereft of their true potency.
strings.ACH_GEN_DESTRUCTION_DESC: Wrought a dreadful total of {damage} wounds. A colossal exhibition of might, honoring {divineLore}.
strings.ACH_GEN_POWER_AVATAR_DESC: Shattered the foe's vanguard, unleashing {damage} cumulative devastation under the banner of {divineLore}.
strings.ACH_GEN_ANVIL_HIT_DESC: Unleashed a singular, ruinous blow, dealing {damage} wounds in a solitary strike.
strings.ACH_GEN_SCYTHE_DESC: Vanquished {kills} adversaries. {divineLoreSubject} claims these souls through {pronounObj}'s deeds.
strings.ACH_GEN_SOUL_HARVESTER_DESC: Administered the final, fatal blow to {kills} foes, systematically cleansing the field of battle.
strings.ACH_GEN_ELITE_EXECUTIONER_DESC: Executed {kills} foes with the chilling precision of a master assassin.
strings.ACH_GEN_SNIPER_DESC: Inflicted {damage} piercing wounds from afar, enduring not a single blow, thus proving peerless command of the projectile.
strings.ACH_GEN_BLADE_DANCE_DESC: Hurled{accord} into the heart of the fray for {divineLore}, inflicting {damage} rending wounds while enduring {extra} damage with furious abandon.
strings.ACH_GEN_ESOTERIC_KNOWLEDGE_DESC: Wrought {damage} pure arcane and elemental destruction, never once needing to cross blades.
strings.ACH_GEN_PRECISION_DESC: Landed {extra} critical strikes, unerringly striking vital organs and chinks in armor.
strings.ACH_GEN_HEDGEHOG_DESC: Punished enemy lapses in guard by unleashing {extra} decisive attacks of opportunity.
strings.ACH_GEN_IMMOBILITY_DESC: Paralyzed or stunned {extra} foes, dictating absolute stasis across the battlefield.
strings.ACH_GEN_ESSENCE_DEVOURER_DESC: Drained {extra} levels of vital essence, reducing enemy souls to hollow husks.
strings.ACH_GEN_MADNESS_SOWER_DESC: Plunged {extra} foes into confusion or stupor, supplanting their tactics with utter pandemonium.
strings.ACH_GEN_WITHERING_FLEAU_DESC: Inflicted {damage} ability damage. The very flesh of foes melted before the embrace of death itself.
strings.ACH_GEN_BLASPHEMOUS_DESC: Wielded both the holy and the unholy ({damage}/{extra} damage). An unrepentant heresy.
strings.ACH_GEN_HOLY_LIGHT_DESC: Channeled the wrath of {divineLore} to inflict {damage} holy damage upon the forces of corruption.
strings.ACH_GEN_UNHOLY_FLEAU_DESC: Inflicted {damage} unholy damage, defiling the very essence of the foe.
strings.ACH_GEN_FIRE_STORM_DESC: Scorched the enemy to ash, inflicting {damage} fire damage.
strings.ACH_GEN_DEADLY_WINTER_DESC: The blood ran cold. Inflicted {damage} cold damage.
strings.ACH_GEN_LIVING_AEGIS_DESC: Withstood {damage} damage and evaded {extra} strikes, holding the front line with unwavering resolve.
strings.ACH_GEN_DAWN_BOND_DESC: Bestowed {extra} blessings and protections upon companions-in-arms in the name of {divineLore}. A beacon of unwavering benevolence amidst the chaos.
strings.ACH_GEN_ACCIDENTAL_TREASON_DESC: Inflicted {damage} damage upon allies in the chaos of battle. A glaring lack of discipline.
strings.ACH_PET_SARKORIS_SPIRIT_TITLE: The Spirit of the Sarkorian Steppes
strings.ACH_PET_SARKORIS_SPIRIT_DESC: The scholars of the Crusade shall write odes to this beast. It did not merely obey; it ruled the melee, leaving mortals to be mere spectators of its wild splendor.
strings.ACH_PET_CATACLYSM_CLAW_DESC: Every swipe of its paw tore the very fabric of the air. With {damage} damage, the beast reminded the demons that the wilds of Iobaria harbor wraths older than their Abyss.
strings.ACH_PET_WOLF_PACK_DESC: A relentless hunt. {kills} carcasses lie in its wake. The beast tasted the warm blood of its prey and brooked no obstacle until the enemy's final breath.
strings.ACH_PET_HUNTER_INSTINCT_DESC: Ran down and slaughtered {kills} fleeing foes. A display of savage opportunism that would bring pride to the clans of Sarkoris.
strings.ACH_PET_FUR_BLOOD_AEGIS_TITLE: The Aegis of Fur and Blood
strings.ACH_PET_FUR_BLOOD_AEGIS_DESC: A loyalty carved in flesh. It intercepted the enemy's wrath, absorbing {damage} damage while evading {extra} assaults to safeguard the lives of its masters.
strings.ACH_PET_SACRIFICED_FLESH_DESC: Wounded{accord} but indomitable, this companion absorbed {damage} damage from iron and fire without ever yielding an inch.
strings.ACH_PET_FOREST_SHADOW_DESC: Incredibly elusive. The enemy struck only the wind {extra} times, unable to land a single blade upon this fleet silhouette.
strings.ACH_PET_JUGULAR_BITE_DESC: Pure instinct never errs. It found the chinks in armor and vital arteries {extra} times, turning the battle into a methodical execution.
strings.ACH_PET_JAW_TRAP_DESC: None flee its territory. The companion punished {extra} attempts at retreat with a swift, ferocious snap of fangs.
strings.ACH_PET_BEAST_DOMINATION_DESC: It terrorized, knocked down, or cornered opponents {extra} times. Hearing its low growl, the enemy lost all will to fight.
strings.ACH_PET_LINE_BREAKER_DESC: It slammed {extra} enemies to the ground with a massive shoulder charge, leaving them vulnerable to the crusaders' blades.
strings.ACH_PET_TUNDRA_MIRAGE_DESC: It threaded the shadows, drawing no blood and suffering no wound—a spectral, yet undaunted presence.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_WORLDBANE_DESC: A monstrosity worthy of a tragic dirge. This creature trampled our sacred banners and struck terror into our very hearts. Its name shall be whispered in dread by those who survived.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_ABYSSAL_FURY_TITLE: The Unleashed Wrath of the Abyss
strings.ACH_ENEMY_ABYSSAL_FURY_DESC: A tempest of iron and hatred. It tore {damage} life from our crusaders, choking the air with the stench of blood and steel-dust.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_PHARASMA_HARVEST_DESC: It brutally severed the thread of fate for {kills} of our companions, casting their souls prematurely into the Boneyard amidst the mocking laughter of this abomination.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_RIGHTEOUS_BLOOD_DESC: It feasted upon the flesh of the Crusade, delivering a fatal blow to one of our own and leaving a permanent scar upon our company's spirit.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_SOUL_TORMENTOR_DESC: A display of refined cruelty. It inflicted {extra} debilitating ailments upon our warriors, seeking not merely to slay, but to force us to crawl in the mire.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_DREAD_GLANCE_DESC: Its aura of sheer malevolence shattered our resolve. Our soldiers quailed before its profane whispers.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_UNHOLY_SIPHON_DESC: With every touch, our life force withered. Drained {extra} energy levels, leaving us broken and in despair.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_SARCOPHAGE_HATRED_DESC: Our consecrated steel blunted against its armor. It absorbed {damage} damage with insulting indifference before finally collapsing.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_BLASPHEMOUS_SILHOUETTE_DESC: It slipped past our arrows and spells with supernatural grace, forcing our strikes to cleave empty air {extra} times.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_TRAITOR_CLAW_DESC: It exploited the chaos to strike like a coward at our backs, dealing {damage} treacherous precision damage.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_EXECUTIONER_HIT_DESC: It exploited the flaws in our consecrated armor {extra} times with cruel precision.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_BUTCHER_DEMENTIA_DESC: In its thirst for slaughter, it cared little whether it spilled the blood of its own kin or ours, dealing {damage} damage to its allies.
strings.ACH_ENEMY_DESECRATION_DEAD_DESC: Death was not enough for this fiend. It savaged our fallen upon the ground, inflicting {damage} abject overkill damage.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_MVP_DESC: Achieved rank {extra} under the crushing weight of Unfair difficulty. {pronoun} rewrote the laws of war, bringing humiliation upon the Worldwound.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_DMG_DESC: Dealt {damage} damage under the wrath of Unfair difficulty, their blade cleaving reality itself to defy the impossible.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_TANK_DESC: Absorbed {damage} damage against unfairly empowered monstrosities. A miracle of physical resilience.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_SNEAK_DESC: In the very fires of Unfair, {pronounObj} dealt {damage} sneak attack damage without ever suffering so much as a scratch from enemy retaliation.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_CC_DESC: Inflicted {extra} crippling ailments upon Unfair monstrosities. Even with the laws of nature bent in their favor, they were brought to their knees.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_KILLS_DESC: Carved through {kills} Unfair threats by the sheer force of cleaving arms. A slaughter of pure virtuosity.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_HEAL_DESC: Restored {damage} hit points. In a world where every strike is lethal, {pronoun} stood as the sole bulwark against the void.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_DODGE_DESC: Evaded {extra} attacks beneath the gaze of unjust foes, moving like a leaf swept away by the tempest.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_CRIT_DESC: Drove {extra} critical strikes into the vulnerabilities of unjust beasts. Clinical precision.
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_PET_TITLE: The Claw of the Final Hour
strings.ACH_DIFF_UNFAIR_PET_DESC: This animal companion fought amidst injustice with a savagery that preserved its masters' lives.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_MVP_DESC: Chosen{accord} as the undisputed champion under the grueling weight of Hard difficulty. A paragon of tactical excellence.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_MAG_DESC: Unleashed {damage} pure magical damage upon enemy forces empowered by Hard difficulty.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_BLUDG_DESC: Shattered the unforgiving lines, dealing {damage} bludgeoning damage and inflicting {extra} knockdowns.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_AOO_DESC: Unleashed {extra} flawless attacks of opportunity, punishing every tactical blunder under the grueling pressure of combat.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_FLAWLESS_DESC: Dominated the fray as champion, emerging completely unscathed despite the trials of Hard difficulty.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_OVERKILL_DESC: Continued to strike beyond the veil of death, unleashing {damage} overkill damage upon formidable foes.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_TANK_DESC: Held the unforgiving vanguard, absorbing {damage} damage and deflecting menacing onslaughts.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_VAMP_DESC: Siphoned the life force of the enemy to restore {damage} hit points in the heart of the melee.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_SNIPER_DESC: Pierced the unforgiving ranks, dealing {damage} ranged damage without once being targeted.
strings.ACH_DIFF_HARD_DRAIN_DESC: Drained the physical essence of the enemy under grueling difficulty, leaving them withered on the precipice of death.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_MVP_DESC: Chosen{accord} as the absolute champion. Unblemished glory.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_ELEMENT_DESC: Unleashed the wrath of nature on the enemy vanguard, compounding massive elemental damage.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_LEGEND_DESC: Dealt {damage} damage without the aid of any mythic or divine favor.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_MARTYR_DESC: Absorbed suffering while binding the wounds of comrades-in-arms.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_CRIT_DESC: Exploited tactical vulnerabilities to land {extra} devastating critical strikes.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_BLITZ_DESC: Slew {kills} enemies in the blink of an eye without ever facing a counterattack.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_SHIELD_DESC: Swept through the enemy vanguard, shattering the bones of their targets and pinning them to the earth.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_SNEAK_DESC: Exploited every exposed flank to deal {damage} precision sneak attack damage.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_HYBRID_DESC: Deftly cycled through physical damage types to shatter the natural resistances of demons.
strings.ACH_DIFF_CORE_DEATH_DESC: Bent the original laws of reality, weaving spells of death or lethal illusion with terrifying efficacy.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_MVP_DESC: Anointed{accord} the absolute champion under the grueling tension of Daring difficulty. Glory begins here.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_BOOM_DESC: Delivered a colossal strike of {damage} damage, shattering enemy morale with a single blow.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_AOO_DESC: Impeccably held the perilous front line, evading blows and punishing every retreat.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_HOLYFIRE_DESC: Purged the enemy vanguard, blending physical flames with holy wrath under Daring difficulty.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_PET_DESC: This companion cleared the fray of Daring difficulty, tearing the life from multiple foes.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_DODGE_DESC: Spent the battle forcing adversaries to strike empty air, accumulating {extra} dodges.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_ACID_DESC: Dissolved enemy armor beneath a downpour of corrosive acid, dealing {damage} damage.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_HOLY_DESC: The fury of the heavens rained down, dealing {damage} holy damage to the forces of the Worldwound.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_SICK_DESC: Unleashed putrid miasma across the front, leaving prey writhing in agony and sickened.
strings.ACH_DIFF_DARING_DEATHSDOOR_DESC: Poised at death's door under grueling difficulty, refused to fall and stood resolute.
strings.ACH_DIFF_NORMAL_MVP_DESC: Anointed{accord} champion of the engagement—a masterclass in overwhelming force.
strings.ACH_DIFF_NORMAL_FLAWLESS_DESC: Led the vanguard's assault without ever spilling a single drop of their own blood.
strings.ACH_DIFF_NORMAL_DMG_DESC: Pulverized the enemy ranks, unleashing a devastating total of {damage} damage.
